The contact owns a 2023 Kia K5. The contact stated that the rear passenger's side chrome trim extending to the trunk had separated from the vehicle. The contact related the failure to TSB Number: SA552. The contact was concerned that the failure could cause a road safety hazard.

narrative.headline: What 2023 Kia K5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 95 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (35% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
